feed.title: Against Allowing Quantum Recovery of Bitcoin

entry.title: Against Allowing Quantum Recovery of Bitcoin
entry.summary: As the provided text does not contain any original content from an email or offer specifics to summarize, I'm unable to create a detailed summary based on the rules you've described. If you provide the content of the programmer's emails or more specific details about the topics covered in them, I'd be able to assist better by extracting and summarizing the key information according to your guidelines. Please include the email content or further details so that an accurate and useful summary can be compiled.
